entities.name: INSECT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to resist damage from insect pests

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Physical characteristics associated with insect resistance

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Chemical characteristics associated with insect resistance

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL MARKERS
entities.description: Markers based on physical traits used to identify resistance

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL MARKERS
entities.description: Markers based on chemical traits used to identify resistance

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA-based markers used to identify resistance to insect pests

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring the physical and biochemical traits of an organism

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The method of identifying quantitative trait loci associated with a specific trait

entities.name: GENETIC LINKAGE MAPS
entities.description: Maps showing the relative positions of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: Agricultural production that meets current needs without compromising future ability to produce
